name: orca-memory-system
description: Multi-modal memory OS for Hermes — semantic search, graph entities, episodic memory, session auto-compaction, code-execution MCP routing, and feedback-driven reinforcement. Installs the Orca skill, MCP server, typed wrappers, and lifecycle hooks in one command.

session_start.description: Guard + bootstrap: validate Orca API health, verify MCP tools are wired, force-discovery warning if not. Recall user profile + project conventions. Inject into system prompt.

post_tool_call.description: Capture ALL tool calls to Orca as episodic memories. Filter large MCP recall results before they hit context.

context_pressure.description: When context occupancy exceeds 70%, auto-compact working memory to Orca and return a working summary.

session_end.description: Compact full session into durable episodic/semantic/procedural memory. Send feedback on all recalls. Save open loops for next session.
